column1: Paul Goldschmidt leads today’s Beat The Streak picks, offering a strong blend of recent form and a favorable matchup against Patrick Corbin, who has allowed steady contact all season. Goldschmidt’s recent uptick at the plate and platoon advantage make him a reliable option. Jackson Chourio also stands out with impressive consistency and a solid home matchup, while Fernando Tatis Jr. is worth a look for his hot stretch and park boost. All three bring steady profiles for hit seekers.
